section_title: 8.2 The Two Maps of Origin: Evolutionary vs. Biblical Epistemologies
visual_assets: MAP: Bantu Migration — Evolutionary Model — show Congo–Niger cradle, western & eastern streams to Great Lakes and Southern Africa; use dashed arrows for proposed spread.
